class.name: GaussianSplatWorld3D
class.brief_description: Scene node that renders a GaussianSplatWorld resource as a merged multi-asset scene.
class.description: GaussianSplatWorld3D renders an entire GaussianSplatWorld resource containing multiple merged splat datasets as a single unified scene. It manages its own GaussianSplatRenderer instance, handles GPU resource lifecycle, and supports quality settings parity with GaussianSplatNode3D. Use [method apply_world] to load and display the world data, or enable [member auto_apply_on_ready] for automatic initialization.

method.name: set_world
method.description: Assigns a GaussianSplatWorld resource containing the merged splat data to render. Call [method apply_world] after assignment to upload the data to the GPU.

method.name: get_world
method.description: Returns the currently assigned GaussianSplatWorld resource, or [code]null[/code] if none is set.

method.name: set_auto_apply_on_ready
method.description: When enabled, the world data is automatically applied and uploaded to the GPU when the node receives the READY notification.

method.name: is_auto_apply_on_ready
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if automatic apply on ready is enabled.

method.name: set_cast_shadow
method.description: Enables or disables shadow casting from this world node.

method.name: is_cast_shadow
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if shadow casting is enabled.

method.name: set_lod_enabled
method.description: Enables or disables level-of-detail culling for the world's splats.

method.name: is_lod_enabled
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if LOD culling is enabled.

method.name: set_lod_bias
method.description: Sets the LOD bias multiplier (0.1 to 4.0). Higher values keep more splats visible.

method.name: get_lod_bias
method.description: Returns the current LOD bias multiplier.

method.name: set_max_render_distance
method.description: Sets the maximum distance in meters at which splats are rendered.

method.name: get_max_render_distance
method.description: Returns the current maximum render distance in meters.

method.name: set_max_splat_count
method.description: Sets the maximum number of splats to render per frame.

method.name: get_max_splat_count
method.description: Returns the current maximum splat count.

method.name: set_use_frustum_culling
method.description: Enables or disables frustum culling for the world's splats.

method.name: is_frustum_culling_enabled
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if frustum culling is enabled.

method.name: set_async_upload_enabled
method.description: Enables or disables asynchronous GPU buffer uploads. When enabled, data is streamed to the GPU without blocking the main thread.

method.name: is_async_upload_enabled
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if asynchronous uploads are enabled.

method.name: set_opacity
method.description: Sets the global opacity for all splats in this world. Range is 0.0 to 1.0.

method.name: get_opacity
method.description: Returns the current opacity value.

method.name: apply_world
method.description: Loads the assigned GaussianSplatWorld resource into the renderer and uploads all splat data to the GPU. Must be called after [method set_world] unless [member auto_apply_on_ready] is enabled.

method.name: clear_world
method.description: Removes all splat data from the renderer and releases associated GPU resources.

method.name: get_renderer
method.description: Returns the internal GaussianSplatRenderer instance managed by this node.

members.member: The GaussianSplatWorld resource containing merged splat datasets to render.
When enabled, the world is automatically applied when the node enters the tree.
Enables shadow casting from this world node.
Maximum number of splats rendered per frame.
Enables frustum culling of offscreen splats.
